title: TeamLease Skills University is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: TeamLease Skills University is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Join the TeamLease Skills University family as a Subject Matter Expert in Bengaluru. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About TeamLease Skills University:
TeamLease Skills University is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TeamLease Skills University!
